name: SHIBAM PAL
summary: Motivated and passionate in Software Development, AI and Cybersecurity. Having hands-on experience in building AI full-stack web applications, RAG Systems, machine learning models, and robust threat detection systems using modern frameworks and cloud technologies, focusing on innovation and real world impact.

education.degree: B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science
Indian Certificate of Secondary Education ICSE

responsibilities: Developed AI applications using LangChain and LangGraph with memory, reasoning, and tool integration.
Built single and multi-agent systems using ReAct, Supervisor, and Swarm architectures.
Designed RAG-based AI solutions for research assistants and document Q&A with advanced retrieval techniques.
Implemented MCP, A2A protocols, and stateful workflows for scalable AI agent communication.
Evaluated and secured LLM applications using DeepEval, LangSmith, and prompt injection guardrails.
Deployed production-ready AI services using Docker, FastAPI, BentoML, GitHub Actions CI/CD, and cloud platforms.
Fine-tuned open-source LLMs with LoRA/QLoRA and developed structured AI pipelines using LlamaIndex and Pydantic.

projects.name: Production RAG Application – Ask My Docs
projects.description: Developed a production-grade domain-specific RAG system using hybrid retrieval (BM25 + vector search) and cross-encoder reranking, improving document retrieval relevance by 30%+. Implemented citation-based response generation and a CI-integrated evaluation pipeline, achieving 90%+ answer accuracy while reducing hallucinations and ensuring reliable knowledge retrieval.
